ranked_scenarios.summary: Screenshots is left in a weird state when navigation occurs while overlay is shown

description.text:
STR:
1. make sure `screenshots.browser.component.enabled` is set to `true`
2. Navigate to https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/contribute/
3. Open the inspector and using the element inspector select the mozilla home icon in the top left corner. Make sure you have the `<a>` element selected
4. Open the screenshots overlay (with toolbar, context menu or shortcut)
5. In the browser console run `$0.click()`

Actual results:
The page navigates and the overlay is hidden but the panel buttons still show

Expected results:
The overlay and panel buttons should both hide

ranked_scenarios.summary: Exit/Copy/Download buttons do not work on certain website with screenshot component enabled

description.text:
Created attachment 9370808
screenshot_bug.webm

Steps to reproduce:
1) Navigate to about:config
2) Make sure `screenshots.browser.component.enabled` is `true`
3) Navigate to https://demos.neolms.com/join_no_access_code
4) Create an account 
5) Navigate to https://demos.neolms.com/account/picture
6) Click "Add Picture"
7) Screenshot an area of the page
8) Click "X" or "Copy" or "Download"

Actual result:
Buttons do not work

Expected result:
Buttons work
